narrative:
Precinct Rushcreek (precinct in Logan County) has 1,451 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.9 percentage points.
